creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 184826
new port: grass7. Move grass -> grass6

Welcome to grass7!

We have created the port for grass7 (http://grass.osgeo.org/).

Poudrier 10/11/12 i386/amd64 ok
Porlint have some fake warnings.

Since graphics/qgis can use grass6 and grass7 (both can be used), I suggest to move databases/grass to databases/grass6.
For databases/grass(6) I take the maintainership of this port.


Regards.
